data.title: GERDAU S.A. - CONSOLIDATED INFORMATION
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, São Paulo reported noteworthy financial results with an Adjusted EBITDA of R$3.0 billion, indicating a 25% increase from the previous quarter. It is crucial to mention that North America significantly contributed, representing 75% of the Company's total Consolidated EBITDA during this period.

data.title: DIRTT to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 7, 2026
data.description: Calgary-based DIRTT Environmental Solutions Ltd. disclosed it will reveal its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 on May 6, 2026. The company, renowned for its industrialized construction solutions, will release the results post-market closure on that day. Trading on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol DRT and on the OTCQX under the symbol DRTTF, DIRTT is a key player in this sector.

data.title: Qfin Holdings Filed 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F
data.description: On April 27, 2026, in Shanghai, China, Qfin Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: QFIN; HKEx: 3660) announced the submission of its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2025, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. This report is available for viewing on the Company's investor relations website and the SEC's website. Qfin Holdings will also distribute a physical copy of the annual report, which includes audited consolidated financial statements, at no cost to shareholders and ADS holders upon request.

data.title: New Peer‑Reviewed Study Reveals Actionable Immune–Microenvironment Target in Brain Metastasis; Medicinova Advances Clinical Translation
data.description: In La Jolla, California, on April 27, 2026, MediciNova, Inc. revealed that a study conducted by researchers at the Spanish National Cancer Research Centre (CNIO) pinpointed a significant discovery in brain metastasis. The researchers identified that macrophage migration inhibitory factor (MIF) plays a crucial role in reprogramming CD74-positive microglia and macrophages. This vulnerability was detailed in a recent publication in the reputable journal "Cancer Research" from March 2026. The study showcased the effectiveness of ibudilast, a brain-penetrant small molecule, in modulating this pathway. MediciNova, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company listed on the NASDAQ Global Market under the ticker symbol MNOV and the Tokyo Stock Exchange under Code Number 4875.

data.title: Churchill Capital Corp XII Announces the Pricing of Upsized $360 Million Initial Public Offering
data.description: In New York on April 27, 2026, Churchill Capital Corp XII reported the pricing of an increased initial public offering of 36,000,000 units at $10.00 each. These units are set to be listed on the Nasdaq Global Market under "CXIIU" starting today. Each unit comprises one Class A ordinary share and one-tenth of a redeemable warrant, with each full warrant allowing the holder to buy one Class A ordinary share at $11.50 per share. Following the start of separate trading, the Company anticipates the Class A ordinary shares and warrants will be listed under "CXII" and "CXIIW" on Nasdaq, respectively. The offering is scheduled to conclude on April 29, 2026, pending standard closing conditions.

data.title: ROYAL CARIBBEAN GROUP CONFIRMS ORDER WITH MEYER TURKU FOR ICON 6 AND 7
data.description: In a recent announcement made in Miami and Turku, Finland on April 27, 2026, Royal Caribbean Group (NYSE: RCL) revealed plans to expand its fleet by ordering a sixth and seventh Icon Class ship. The deal, confirmed with Meyer Turku, is set for delivery in 2029 and 2030, showcasing the group's commitment to redefining the future of vacations. This move signifies a significant investment in the cruise industry, with the addition of these two vessels contributing to the company's strategic growth. Royal Caribbean Group's decision to expand its fleet aligns with its goal of providing innovative and unforgettable vacation experiences for travelers worldwide.

data.title: MINILUXE REPORTS FULL-YEAR FINANCIAL RESULTS FOR YEAR ENDED DECEMBER 28, 2025
data.description: The company has reported exceptional results for the year 2025, achieving record performance across strategic objectives and significant financial indicators. These include an impressive average unit volume (AUV) of $1.3 million and a remarkable year-over-year (YoY) store-level profitability growth of over 50%. This outstanding performance demonstrates the company's strong momentum and successful execution of key priorities.

data.title: Fuel Retailers Applaud Legislation to Extend Biodiesel Blenders' Tax Credit
data.description: In Alexandria, Virginia on April 27, 2026, industry organizations NATSO, SIGMA, and NACS praised Rep. Mike Carey (R-Ohio) for presenting the bipartisan "Biodiesel Tax" bill. This bill aims to provide support for America's travel centers, truck stops, and fuel marketers. The bill has garnered significant attention and support from various stakeholders.

data.title: CANNON RESOURCES ANNOUNCES ROBUST PRELIMINARY ECONOMIC ASSESSMENT FOR THE FISHER EAST NICKEL PROJECT
data.description: An economic assessment of the project has revealed a post-tax net present value at an 8% discount rate amounting to US$746 million, along with an internal rate of return of approximately 54%. The project also boasts a first-quartile cash cost of US$3.88 per pound of nickel equivalent. Additionally, it is estimated that the project will achieve a payback period of around 2 years.

data.title: Industry and Policy Leaders Gather for North American Environment, Energy & Natural Resources Conference at UH Law
data.description: Taking place in Houston on April 27, 2026, the 10th Annual North American Environment, Energy & Natural Resources Conference will convene senior industry executives, legal experts, and policymakers to analyze the factors influencing North America's energy sector. This event will provide a platform for discussing crucial topics related to the region's energy landscape.

data.title: Brera Holdings PLC (d/b/a Solmate Infrastructure) Received Nasdaq Staff Determination Regarding Minimum Bid Price Deficiency; Intends to Request Hearing Before Independent Panel
data.description: Dublin-based Brera Holdings PLC, known as Solmate Infrastructure (NASDAQ: SLMT), announced that on April 23, 2026, they received a notice from Nasdaq Stock Market LLC to delist the Company's Class B ordinary shares ($0.005 nominal value per share). The Staff Determination letter stated that the delisting decision was made by Nasdaq's Listing Qualifications Staff.

data.title: Mayfair Gold Provides Update on Project Work in the First Quarter of 2026 Advancing and Derisking the Fenn-Gib Gold Project
data.description: Mayfair Gold Corp. has shared an update on their progress in Q1 of 2026. The company, listed on NYSE American as MINE and TSXV as MFG, outlined key accomplishments and plans for the rest of the year in Vancouver, BC on April 27, 2026. This information is significant for investors and stakeholders to track the company's performance.

data.title: RevolutionEHR Launches AI Scribe, Bringing Hands-Free Documentation to the Optometry Exam Room
data.description: A new service called AI Scribe has been launched by RevolutionEHR in San Diego. This innovative technology captures exam notes in real-time, aiming to expedite chart completion, decrease after-hours work, and enable healthcare providers to prioritize patient care.

data.title: Canada's proposed bill aims to prohibit crypto donations in politics as oversight on stablecoins and digital assets is increased.
data.description: Legislators are working to advance new election reform measures that aim to prohibit cryptocurrency contributions to campaigns, amidst growing concerns over their potential influence. Meanwhile, Canada is ramping up its supervision of stablecoins and the digital asset market to ensure transparency and security. This move comes as part of a broader effort to strengthen oversight in the fast-evolving financial landscape. The proposed reform would prohibit the acceptance of crypto donations, a practice that has raised significant debate due to its anonymity and potential for illicit activities. This action is part of an ongoing push to enhance transparency and accountability in political financing, with calls for stricter regulations gaining momentum. In a parallel development, Canada is expanding its regulatory scrutiny over stablecoins and digital assets to ward off possible risks and ensure investor protection. These efforts underline a global trend towards greater regulation in the cryptocurrency space, reflecting a growing recognition of the need to mitigate potential risks and safeguard financial systems.
